nasb.text: When he had read it, he asked from what province he was, and when he learned that he was from Cilicia,

esv.text: On reading the letter, he asked what province he was from. And when he learned that he was from Cilicia,

cnv.text: 總督讀了信，就問保羅是哪一省的人；知道了他是基利家人，

ccb.text: 总督看过公文，便问保罗是哪省的人，得知保罗是基利迦人，就说：

csbs.text: 总督读了信，问保罗是哪一个省的人，知道他是奇里乞亚省的人，
